emails.subject: API Documentation Needed - Flask Project
emails.body:
Hi Alice,

I need your help with documenting our Flask API. We've been adding endpoints without proper documentation and it's becoming hard for new team members to understand what's available.

Could you go through the API codebase and create a comprehensive reference document? I need:

1. All route paths (like /api/users, /api/products, etc.)
2. The HTTP methods supported by each endpoint (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)
3. A brief description of what each endpoint does based on the function docstrings

The route files should be in the routes directory - look for the @app.route decorators in the Python files.

Please save the documentation as api_reference.md in the docs folder. Let me know on Slack when it's done so I can share it with the team.

Thanks!
Sarah
